data.description: QuoteMedia Announces Financial Results for 2025 and Strong Growth Outlook

data.title: Subsea7 and SLB OneSubsea Sign  Strategic Collaboration Agreement with PETRONAS Suriname
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Subsea 7 S.A. revealed a strategic collaboration deal involving PETRONAS Suriname E&P B.V. and Subsea Integration Alliance. The alliance, consisting of Subsea 7 and SLB OneSubsea, solidified a partnership for joint work on field development projects in Suriname. This agreement signifies a lasting commitment to cooperation and coordination between the parties involved.

data.title: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. to Host Conference Call on Its First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Rutland, Vermont, on April 7th, 2026, Casella Waste Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CWST), a company specializing in solid waste, recycling, and resource management services, has announced that it will be disclosing its financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026, concluding on March 31st. These results are scheduled to be unveiled after the markets close on Thursday, April 30th, 2026.

data.title: GRAIL Announces Integration of the Galleri® Test into Epic Electronic Health Record Platform to Expand Access Nationwide
data.description: A partnership has been established that will provide around 450 health systems with access to Galleri test results through their current patient portal. This collaboration with Epic will allow clinicians to easily order the Galleri Multi-Cancer Early Detection Test while treating patients. This integration aims to enhance healthcare effectiveness and streamline the process for approximately 450 health systems.

data.title: Insmed Provides Clinical Update on Phase 2b CEDAR Study
data.description: Insmed Incorporated announced that a recent study focusing on brensocatib did not reach its primary or secondary efficacy goals. Consequently, the company has decided to halt the program for treating HS. Despite this setback, the safety profile of brensocatib remains in line with earlier studies, with no new safety concerns detected for either dosage used. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, from the company's headquarters in Bridgewater, New Jersey.

data.title: Amneal to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 1, 2026
data.description: Amneal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMRX) based in Bridgewater, N.J., revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Friday, May 1, 2026, before the market opens. The Company is set to have an audio webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day.

data.title: ZIEGLER CLOSES $86,215,000 FINANCING FOR MENNONITE VILLAGE (OR)
data.description: Announced in Chicago on April 7, 2026, a specialty investment bank, Ziegler, has successfully closed on $86,215,000 Series 2026AB Bonds (referred to as the "Bonds") for Mennonite Village. This transaction was facilitated through the Hospital Facility Authority of the City of Albany, Oregon. The funds will support Mennonite Home of Albany...

data.title: EPAM Announces Date for First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Newtown-based EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) announced that they will conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on Thursday, May 7, 2026, to review their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. EPAM is a prominent company specializing in digital transformation services and product engineering. The call will offer insights into key financial figures and strategic developments during this period.

data.title: Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. Hosts First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. (NYSE:CFR) announced a forthcoming conference call scheduled for April 30, 2026, to address the first quarter financial results of 2026. The earnings release for Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. will be accessible at around 8:00 AM on the same day. This event signifies a significant update for investors and stakeholders of the company, providing an opportunity to delve into the performance numbers of the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Aircastle to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results on April 21, 2026
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Stamford-based Aircastle Limited revealed its intention to unveil its financial results for Q4 and the full year ended on February 28, 2026. The report is scheduled to be released on April 21, 2026, before the market opens.

data.title: How researchers build trust in AI-driven teams: University of Phoenix presents new findings at global qualitative research conference
data.description: During the 17th Annual Qualitative Report Conference held in Phoenix on April 7, 2026, researchers from the College of Doctoral Studies and CEITR discussed trustworthiness in AI-integrated research teams and the collaboration between humans and AI in cognitive processes. Insights were shared on qualitative methods in this context. The conference featured discussions on best practices for maintaining trust in research teams that incorporate artificial intelligence.

data.title: $11B lost in 2025 to crypto scams, with many minors also affected, resulting in over $5M in losses, per FBI.
data.description: The bureau reported that a significant quantity of individuals under the age of 18, specifically 17 and younger, were involved in grievances concerning cryptocurrency or cryptocurrency ATMs. This led to total losses exceeding $5 million.

data.title: JZMK Partners Selected to Design New Commercial Passenger Terminal at Jacqueline Cochran Regional Airport
data.description: Today, JZMK Partners revealed that they have been hired by Coachella Airports, LLC to create the inaugural Commercial Passenger Terminal at Jacqueline Cochran Regional Airport (JCRA) in the City of Thermal, situated in the Coachella Valley in California. This marks a significant milestone in the airport's development, signaling the initiation of passenger services at the facility. The project will involve the design and construction of the terminal to accommodate the growing number of travelers through the airport. The JCRA terminal is set to enhance the region's access to air travel, providing a much-needed resource for the local community and visitors.

data.title: University of Arizona Eller College of Management Earns Accolades from U.S. News & World Report
data.description: In the latest rankings, the Eller College of Management at the University of Arizona has solidified its reputation with six out of eight programs being named in the Top 25 for On-Ground Graduate Programs. This achievement highlights the college's dedication to academic excellence. The recognition comes as a validation for the institution, with six programs standing out among their peers. The University of Arizona in Tucson is proud to have such an impressive representation, showcasing the high quality of education provided. This acknowledgment further cements the college's place among the best, emphasizing its commitment to offering top-notch graduate programs.

data.title: Infrasense Completes Advanced Subsurface Utility Mapping Along Beacon Street in Boston's Back Bay
data.description: In Boston on April 7, 2026, The Infrasense group finished a thorough subsurface utility engineering (SUE) study on Beacon Street in Back Bay. This survey provides essential infrastructure details to aid development in Boston.
